description: Implement the Playwright test in `e2e/app.spec.js` for the Course Marketplace home page. Application code is correct and matches `main`; your job is test automation only. The spec must verify that the public home loads: document title matches Course Marketplace, loading and error states resolve, the level-1 heading "Course Marketplace" is visible, and the tagline about browsing courses appears. Run `npm run test:e2e` from the repo root (runner sets BASE_URL). Do not hardcode ports.
expectedOutcome: `npm run test:e2e` passes: Playwright uses BASE_URL, asserts title / h1 / tagline per the task, with no flaky hardcoded URLs. Same UI contract as the reference implementation on `main`.
hint: Use `page.goto('/')` then assertions on title, `getByRole('heading', …)`, and visible text. Follow `.savyre/savyre-library-hints.json` when configuring the Savyre library (scored path `e2e/app.spec.js`, overlay off).
